ogTitle: Neerim South vs Nelse: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Neerim South and Nelse.
heading: Neerim South vs Nelse — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Neerim South, Victoria and Nelse, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Neerim South has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Nelse (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Neerim South or Nelse safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Neerim South has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Nelse scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Neerim South scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Nelse scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Neerim South or Nelse?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Neerim South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.08% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
